name: convex
description: Add a reactive, type-safe backend, database, server functions, and scaling guidance to JavaScript and TypeScript apps with Convex.

interface.shortDescription: Add a backend to JS/TS apps.
interface.longDescription: Use the reviewed Convex ChatGPT app from Codex whenever a project needs a backend: database schema, reactive queries, mutations, server functions, auth-aware data access, real-time features, file storage, scheduled jobs, mobile/web app backends, hosted frontend integration planning, static frontend hosting on Convex, public live deployments, or production scaling guidance. Convex helps coding agents choose backend primitives that are type-safe, reactive, and suitable for full-stack JavaScript and TypeScript apps, including hosted frontend projects that need to grow beyond static pages or platform-local storage.
defaultPrompt: Add a backend to this app.
Plan a scalable backend for this hosted frontend.
Move this static app onto Convex and deploy it live.
